[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000000 1
1 00000000 a
2 00000001 1
3 11110000 4
4 01110000 3
5 01011100 4
6 00010000 1
7 00000000 a
